events.title: Outlook: Prepare for your meeting with Copilot chat in Outlook mobile
events.titleJa: Microsoft 365 Copilot の会議・チャット機能を更新
events.titleEn: Outlook: Prepare for your meeting with Copilot chat in Outlook mobile
events.summary: Outlook mobile users can now prepare for their meetings using Copilot chat in a single tap. This feature requires a Microsoft 365 Copilot license.
events.summaryJa: Outlook mobile users can now prepare for their meetings using Copilot chat in a single tap. This feature requires a Microsoft 365 Copilot license.
events.summaryEn: Outlook mobile users can now prepare for their meetings using Copilot chat in a single tap. This feature requires a Microsoft 365 Copilot license.
events.importanceReason: 提供開始済みで利用可否の確認に直結するため / ライセンス設計や展開判断に直結するため

events.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Files found via Chat search can be now analyzed by code interpreter
events.titleJa: コード インタープリタ機能の拡張
events.titleEn: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Files found via Chat search can be now analyzed by code interpreter
events.summary: Code interpreter runs on files you upload in your agent or that the user explicitly attaches in the interaction. Files that Copilot Chat finds via enterprise search can be now analyzed by code interpreter without the need to explicitly link or upload them.
events.summaryJa: Code interpreter runs on files you upload in your agent or that the user explicitly attaches in the interaction. Files that Copilot Chat finds via enterprise search can be now analyzed by code interpreter without the need to explicitly link or upload them.
events.summaryEn: Code interpreter runs on files you upload in your agent or that the user explicitly attaches in the interaction. Files that Copilot Chat finds via enterprise search can be now analyzed by code interpreter without the need to explicitly link or upload them.
events.importanceReason: 提供開始済みで利用可否の確認に直結するため / 管理やガバナンスへの影響が大きいため

events.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Now smarter with visuals: Declarative Agents leverage embedded images for richer, more accurate answers
events.titleJa: 埋め込み画像を使った応答精度向上に対応
events.titleEn: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Now smarter with visuals: Declarative Agents leverage embedded images for richer, more accurate answers
events.summary: Declarative Agents have been enhanced to interpret and ground responses using images embedded in files such as Word documents (.docx), PowerPoint presentations (.pptx), and PDFs. This capability allows the agent to extract insights from visual elements like charts, diagrams, and screenshots, ensuring that answers are...

This capability allows the agent to extract insights from visual elements like charts, diagrams, and...

events.title: Microsoft 365 app: Overview Page in Copilot Notebooks
events.titleJa: Copilot Notebooks の要約・インサイトを強化
events.titleEn: Microsoft 365 app: Overview Page in Copilot Notebooks
events.summary: Users will find Copilot-powered Notebook summaries and insights as a landing page within their Copilot Notebook.
events.summaryJa: Users will find Copilot-powered Notebook summaries and insights as a landing page within their Copilot Notebook.
events.summaryEn: Users will find Copilot-powered Notebook summaries and insights as a landing page within their Copilot Notebook.
